What does the name Rehan mean

The name Rehan is a common male given name in various cultures and languages. It is a variant of the name Rohan, which has several origins and meanings. In Sanskrit, Rohan means "dawn" or "light." In Persian, Rohan means "light" or "clarity." In Hindi, Rehan means "wise" or "intelligent." In Urdu, Rehan means "wise" or "intelligent" as well. The name Rehan is also commonly used in Pakistan and India.
What does the name Roshan mean

The name Roshan is a common male given name in various cultures and languages. It is a variant of the name Rohan, which has several origins and meanings. In Sanskrit, Rohan means "dawn" or "light." In Persian, Rohan means "light" or "clarity." In Hindi, Roshan means "bright" or "radiant." In Urdu, Roshan means "bright" or "radiant" as well. The name Roshan is also commonly used in Pakistan and India.
